failure_modes.text: Rigid procedure can fail when novelty or ambiguity is doing most of the causal work and the team mistakes repeatability for understanding.
failure_modes.source_quote: Danger when novelty, ambiguity, or human emotion is doing most of the causal work and a rigid procedure is mistaken for actual understanding.
failure_modes.mitigation: Test the procedure against a genuinely novel scenario; if the algorithm cannot handle the new case without human judgment, the structure is masking understanding gaps.

failure_modes.text: Procedures can optimize visible proxies while ignoring exceptions, tacit knowledge, or changing context.
failure_modes.source_quote: Danger when rules are optimized to visible proxies while exceptions, tacit knowledge, or changing context are treated as noise.
failure_modes.mitigation: Build in explicit exception-handling branches and review the algorithm against the broadest mental-model latticework available, not just the procedural domain.

failure_modes.text: Algorithmic structure can oversimplify living social systems if implementation complexity is treated as a clean step-by-step execution problem.
failure_modes.source_quote: Applying purely rational, step-by-step problem-solving to implementation oversimplifies what is required to translate ideas into action within a living, social system.
failure_modes.mitigation: Separate the analytical clarity of the algorithm from its human implementation; ensure the how-to-execute step accounts for social dynamics, not just logical correctness.

premortem_questions.text: Which edge case or exception would break this procedure even if the happy path looks clean?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Best used when a process benefits from explicit branching rules, bounded edge cases, and coordination across specialized components or agents.

premortem_questions.text: What part of this process is being treated as noise even though it carries decision-critical tacit knowledge?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Danger when rules are optimized to visible proxies while exceptions, tacit knowledge, or changing context are treated as noise.

premortem_questions.text: If this routine failed in a novel situation, which assumption in the procedure would be the most misleading one?
premortem_questions.source_quote: When we encounter genuinely novel problems, we sometimes persist in using frames that are unhelpful or misleading in the new and different context.

heuristics.text: Break the task into repeatable steps with explicit handoffs so the logic can be checked instead of assumed.
heuristics.source_quote: The task can be decomposed into repeatable steps with clear handoffs, inputs, and output quality checks.

heuristics.text: Define branching rules and bounded exceptions before scale forces many people or systems to improvise inconsistently.
heuristics.source_quote: Best used when a process benefits from explicit branching rules, bounded edge cases, and coordination across specialized components or agents.

heuristics.text: Add quality checks at the output boundary so consistency is earned through verification, not assumed from the procedure name.
heuristics.source_quote: Consistency, auditability, or scale matter more than improvisation because many people or systems must execute the same logic reliably.

curation_notes.summary: Focused on repeatable steps, explicit branching, and anti-proxy discipline rather than on generic automation rhetoric.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor workflow sprawl because the raw source is stronger on procedure design, edge cases, and trustworthy execution.
open_questions: The third heuristic compresses the trust and consistency material so it stays reusable beyond AI or agent-specific contexts.

allies: The raw allies section is strong on systems-thinking, scientific-method style rigor, and reflective process monitoring for later relation preservation.
antagonists: The raw antagonists section is strong on simplification, feedback drift, and confirmation pressure through procedure design.
structured_tensions: The source contains an explicit structured tension block that should survive into Wave 3 with only bounded normalization.
